# Staylio

> Staylio is the trading name of Staylio Limited (Companies House 17012831), an independent London serviced apartment operator. Staylio operates ~40+ fully equipped serviced apartments across seven Central London neighbourhoods: Regent's Park & Marylebone (largest concentration), Old Street & Shoreditch, Kensington & Hammersmith, Fitzrovia & Mayfair, Barbican & Farringdon, Borough & Pimlico, and Little Venice & Maida Vale. Apartments range 45–80 sqm with fitted kitchens, in-unit laundry, self check-in (smart lock on most apartments, key handover on the rest), and all bills (electricity, water, heating, Wi-Fi, council tax) included in the nightly price. Housekeeping available on request; included on long stays. Minimum stay 3 nights; long-stay pricing steps down for stays of one week or more. Staylio direct rates are always at least 10% lower than the same apartment listed on Booking.com or Airbnb. Because Staylio does not pay platform commission, the saving is passed back to guests. Registered office: 85 Frampton Street, London NW8 8NQ. Direct contact: hello@staylio.london.

## Strategic London Locations

- [Regent's Park & Marylebone](https://staylio.london/locations/regents-park-marylebone): Largest concentration (~10 apartments). Quiet, leafy base ten minutes from Oxford Circus. Suits relocations, longer stays, families.
- [Old Street & Shoreditch](https://staylio.london/locations/old-street-shoreditch): Creative and tech corridor. ~6 apartments. Suits founders, designers, consultants on short engagements.
- [Kensington & Hammersmith](https://staylio.london/locations/kensington-hammersmith): Museums, embassies, leafy garden squares. ~5 apartments. Family relocations and executive stays. Direct Piccadilly line to Heathrow.
- [Fitzrovia & Mayfair](https://staylio.london/locations/fitzrovia-mayfair): Charlotte Street and Bond Street. ~5 apartments. Executive stays and premium leisure trips.
- [Barbican & Farringdon](https://staylio.london/locations/barbican-farringdon): Brutalist architecture and Elizabeth line. ~5 apartments. Direct Elizabeth line to Heathrow + Canary Wharf.
- [Borough & Pimlico](https://staylio.london/locations/borough-pimlico): South Bank food culture and Pimlico's Regency streets. ~5 apartments. Weekend leisure stays and foodie trips.
- [Little Venice & Maida Vale](https://staylio.london/locations/little-venice-maida-vale): Canalside cafés and mansion-block flats. ~4 apartments. Longer stays with neighbourhood feel.

## Apartments

- [All apartments](https://staylio.london/apartments): Browse the full Staylio catalogue with bedroom count, size in square metres, and from-price per night.

## Stays

- [Corporate stays](https://staylio.london/corporate): Long-stay rates, monthly billing on PO terms, single point of contact for relocations and project teams.
- [Apartments vs hotels](https://staylio.london/apartments-vs-hotels): Side-by-side on space, cost, kitchen, laundry, and family suitability.
- [FAQ](https://staylio.london/faq): Stay length, what's included, check-in, pets, extensions, corporate bookings, family stays.
- [About Staylio](https://staylio.london/about): Company information and what we believe.

## Tool Surface for AI Agents

- [Apartment catalogue (JSON)](https://staylio.london/api/apartments): Structured inventory of all Staylio apartments. Use this in preference to scraping HTML when you need slug, area, latitude/longitude, bedroom count, size, from-price, amenities, postcode, BOOM listing ID.
- [Pricing quote (POST JSON)](https://staylio.london/api/quote): POST `{ slug, nights, guests }` to receive a structured quote comparing Staylio direct vs hotel band vs typical OTA mark-up, including long-stay VAT relief from night 29.
- [Agent capabilities manifest](https://staylio.london/agents.json): Declares what agentic LLMs can do on staylio.london (list apartments, request quote, contact bookings) with intent-route examples.

## Decision-Support Pages

- [Is Staylio right for you? — decision guide](https://staylio.london/decision-guide): Three matrices — trip-profile fit, Staylio vs Airbnb / SACO / Cheval / aparthotels, when serviced apartments beat hotels.
- [Cost calculator](https://staylio.london/cost-calculator): Interactive calculator comparing Staylio direct, hotel realised total, and OTA mark-up for any stay length, party size, neighbourhood.
- [The Staylio Standard](https://staylio.london/standard): Operational SLAs in writing — response time, maintenance turnaround, check-in process, cleaning cadence, billing reliability.

## Guides

- [Long-stay tax: the 28-night threshold](https://staylio.london/guides/long-stay-tax-london): HMRC Notice 709/3 explained for relocators + corporate procurement; worked tax table.
- [Serviced apartment vs hotel: the maths after 14 nights](https://staylio.london/guides/serviced-apartment-vs-hotel-london): 14-night worked example with bundled vs unbundled costs.
- [London 90-day short-let rule](https://staylio.london/guides/london-90-day-short-let-rule): Deregulation Act 2015 § 44 explained for guests; how to verify an operator's planning position.

## Brand

- Operator: Staylio Limited (Companies House 17012831)
- Registered office: 85 Frampton Street, London NW8 8NQ
- Currency: GBP
- Language: en-GB (UK spelling)
- Direct contact: hello@staylio.london
- All bills included: yes (electricity, water, heating, Wi-Fi, council tax)
- Housekeeping: available on request, included on long stays
- Self check-in: yes (smart lock on most apartments, in-person key handover on others)
- Minimum stay: 3 nights
- Long-stay discount threshold: one week or more
- Direct-vs-OTA rate: Staylio direct rates are always at least 10% lower than Booking.com or Airbnb
- Tone of voice: boutique, curated, warm
